The Kitchen Sink Benchmark
Every feature on a few pages: a general parity yardstick.
Typography
Plain, bold, italic, underlined, struck, highlighted, colored, x2 and H2O.
Cambria at 14pt for a serif line of text.
Arial at 10pt, the workhorse sans.
Times New Roman at 12pt, the classic.
Georgia at 11pt brings wide digits 0123456789.
Courier New at 10pt is monospaced.
